title: Workflow Agent Skill Metadata
description: A machine-verifiable projection of SKILL.md frontmatter. The Markdown body is still checked per docs/skill-file.md.

name.description: A stable Skill name using lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.

description.description: The trigger note; must state when to use it and when not to.

compatibility.description: Optional. Records platform, tool, or runtime capability requirements.
